articles.title: THE ENTERPRISE
articles.summary: 60% of people say they don't currently have the right capabilities to get their work done. This gap — noted in Microsoft's work trend index report — highlights the urgent need for leaders to build AI literacy within their teams [4] as soon as possible. Equip your workforce with the skills [4] they need to thrive professionally and ensure your organization is competitively positioned to lead in an

articles.title: AI-driven world with this resource bundle.
QWEN 2.5 1M CONTEXT
articles.summary: Really powerful and local 1M context models from the Qwen team. They show how the team gradually extended the context ability throughout training. Additionally, the Qwen team has released its inference framework built on top of vLLM which is as much as 7x faster.

articles.title: ELEVENLABS RAISES $250M AT $3B VALUATION
articles.summary: ElevenLabs secured significant funding to expand its AI voice technology platform, emphasizing new applications in entertainment, accessibility, and virtual assistants.

articles.title: DEEPSEEK CLAIMS ITS 'REASONING' MODEL BEATS OPENAI'S O1 ON CERTAIN BENCHMARKS
articles.summary: DeepSeek's DeepSeek-R1 reasoning model matches OpenAI's o1 on benchmarks like AIME and MATH-500. With 671 billion parameters, it offers competitive performance at a lower cost but is subject to Chinese regulation constraints. Available on Hugging Face, this release comes amid U.S.-China tensions over AI tech development and export controls.

articles.title: GAUSSIAN SURFACE TRACKING AND RECONSTRUCTION
articles.summary: The GSTAR method presented in this work shows an amazing way to both reconstruct dynamic meshes and track every point in 3D. While it does require carefully calibrated multi-view cameras, it is a great step forward to the single view case.

articles.title: TRAINING A SPEECH SYNTHESIZER
articles.summary: Alex Nichol from OpenAI has released a great blog post showing how to train a speech synthesizer. This method, which uses VQVAEs and autoregressive models, is common in multimodal understanding and generation.

articles.title: PARAMETER-EFFICIENT FINE-TUNING FOR FOUNDATION MODELS
articles.summary: This survey reviews parameter-efficient fine-tuning techniques for foundation models, offering insights into methods that minimize computational costs while maintaining performance across diverse tasks.

articles.title: REASONING ON LLAMA (GITHUB GIST)
articles.summary: This is the current minimal working replication of the reasoning models presented originally by OpenAI and published by DeepSeek. It uses format and correctness rewards across math problems. This particular snippet also shows the “aha” moment when training for sufficiently long.

articles.title: 1PROMPT1STORY
articles.summary: 1Prompt1Story is a training-free approach for consistent text-to-image generations with a single concatenated prompt.

articles.title: IMAGE GENERATION WITH COT
articles.summary: This project investigates the potential of CoT reasoning to enhance autoregressive image generation.

articles.title: AI STARTUPS IN EDUCATION
articles.summary: Google highlights emerging startups using AI to create innovative tools for personalized learning, content generation, and student engagement in education.

articles.title: 3D TUMOR DATASET
articles.summary: AbdomenAtlas 3.0 is the first public dataset with high-quality abdominal CTs and paired radiology reports. The database includes more than 9,000 CT scans with radiology reports and per-voxel annotations of liver, kidney, and pancreatic tumors.

articles.title: THE PARADOX OF SELF-BUILDING AGENTS: TEACHING AI TO TEACH ITSELF
articles.summary: AI agents are transforming from reactive tools to proactive systems, with potential to redefine enterprise software by collapsing traditional software stacks. Yohei Nakajima outlines four levels of autonomy for agents, highlighting advancements from fixed capabilities to anticipatory self-building. Despite their promise, these agents require safeguards to prevent misuse, with careful design and oversight being essential to balance innovation with security.

articles.title: LIGHTPANDA BROWSER
articles.summary: Headless and lightweight browser designed for AI and automation.

articles.title: AI INNOVATIONS FOR RETAILERS
articles.summary: Google Cloud unveils new AI tools for retailers, focusing on personalized shopping experiences, real-time inventory management, and predictive analytics.

articles.title: GOOGLE AI STUDIO (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Google AI Studio is the fastest way to start building with Gemini.
